title: Dreamy Creamy Norwegian Coconut Pudding
description: A rich and creamy Norwegian dessert featuring coconut cream and a crunchy coconut cream crack topping, perfect for a lazy Sunday, and is egg-free friendly. This nutty and pillowy pudding is a delight to the taste buds.
instructions: In a medium saucepan, combine the coconut cream, coconut sugar, and salt, and heat over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the sugar has dissolved.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from the heat and stir in the unsweetened almond milk and vanilla extract.
Let the mixture cool to room temperature, then cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours.
Just before serving, sprinkle the shredded coconut over the top of the pudding.
Drizzle the coconut oil over the shredded coconut.
Top the pudding with the coconut cream crack topping.
Serve the pudding chilled, garnished with additional shredded coconut if desired.
